Dashboard Archive: 2026-05-12 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker Output Today's data shows STRO as the dominant momentum leader with a composite score of 97.5 and rank #1, driven by extraordinary returns across all timeframes (401% over 6 months, 369% annually) paired with perfect SMA positioning above all four key moving averages. The ratio consistency is exceptional at 4 out of 5 passes, with particularly strong acceleration from week-to-month (5.84x) and month-to-quarter (2.87x), indicating sustained buying momentum rather than a single spike. STRO's resilience metric (99.1 out of 100 on bad SPY days) is noteworthy, meaning it maintained strength even when the broader market weakened, and it outperformed SPY by 338% over the year while showing only normal volatility (1.026 ratio). ELA ranks second with a solid 6-month return of 138% and also passes all SMA gates, but shows signs of consolidation with a flat month-to-month return (0.99x ratio) and a problematic week-to-day ratio (-95.01) from yesterday's weakness, though it still outperformed SPY by 235% annually, suggesting it may be entering a correction phase after its initial 39% weekly surge.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
